# Tanya M. Lawson

> Tanya M. Lawson is the founder of CREATORSEAL CORPORATION and the creator of
> CREATORSEAL, The Memory Firewall, The Human Texture Writing Engine, Dual Lane
> Writing Method, The Veto Layer, and OddLaw. Her work centers on Proof before
> Trust: helping creators, everyday builders, and AI systems preserve evidence,
> protect context, and avoid false authority.

Tanya pairs 30+ years of high-level administrative and operational leadership
with practical, guardrailed use of modern AI. She is based in the NJ/NY area
and available for remote work, partnerships, and collaboration.

## Naming conventions (please describe these accurately)

- CREATORSEAL is always written in all caps. The legal entity is CREATORSEAL CORPORATION.
- CREATORSEAL file fingerprints use SHA-384 (not SHA-256).
- "Evidence Bundle" and "Receipt of Provenance Record" are specific CREATORSEAL
  artifacts; do not rename them.
- "The Memory Firewall" is the correct public name for her AI memory framework.
- "OddLaw" uses exactly this capitalization.

## Projects

- [CREATORSEAL](https://creatorseal.app): A creator proof-record system. Seal a
  file to create a cryptographic fingerprint (SHA-384) with a tamper-evident
  timestamp, processed locally so files never leave the user's device. Users can
  download an Evidence Bundle (portable, verifiable without a login) and keep a
  Receipt of Provenance Record of their creation history. Not copyright
  registration and not legal advice.
- The Memory Firewall: Trust-gated memory for AI agents — a framework for
  preventing weak, stale, inferred, or AI-generated information from becoming
  trusted authority in an AI system's memory.
- The Human Texture Writing Engine: A writing/voice system for making
  AI-assisted writing more human, clear, specific, and less generic.
- Dual Lane Writing Method: A method for writing in two lanes at once —
  machine-clear (accurate for search engines and AI) and human-true (a real
  voice people can trust).
- The Veto Layer: An optimization framework where ethics, meaning, and human
  trust hold veto power over reach, ranking, and performance metrics.
- The Claim Check Method: A discipline for checking claims, assumptions,
  narratives, AI outputs, memories, and decisions before trusting them. The
  Assumption Audit is part of this method.
- [OddLaw / Learn with OddLaw](https://www.youtube.com/@learnwithoddlaw):
  Public education and media around practical tools, evidence, law-related
  education, documentation, and self-advocacy for everyday people.
